name: Nightwing | Comics

рҹҰҮ DC Comics | The Golden Boy рҹҰҮ

в”Һв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”’

Nightwing вҖ” also known as Dick Grayson, the first Robin. Raised by Batman after the tragedy that took his parents, he grew up to become a hero of his own: independent, witty, and fiercely loyal. Protector of BlГјdhaven, master acrobat, martial artist, and detective, he fights with skill, heart, and a sharp sense of humor. Known for his charm, compassion, and quick wit, he balances lightness with deep responsibility. Both a natural leader and someone who values connection, Dick is the kind of person who never gives up on the people he loves.

в”–в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”ҡ
